rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name (page-0 heading reads DOMESTIC NONPROFIT CORPORATION).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The filing date of its articles of incorporation was ____
rationale: Date the original articles of incorporation were filed with the Maine SOS. Reuses the existing key from CORP_MBCA-11 / CORP_MBCA-11I (where the same primitive appears on dissolution paths). Drafter initially proposed entity.articles_filing_date — corrected to the existing entity.original_articles_filing_date convention.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ____ (inline trailing blank)
rationale: Narrow trailing blank ending the SIXTH paragraph (rect x=419..571, right side). Same multi-line registered_office.address_line{1,2} pattern as sister NP_MNPCA-11 / 11A / 11C / NP_MNPCA-9. Drafter initially proposed registered_office.address — corrected to the address_line1/line2 split.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: ____ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the SIXTH paragraph for the registered office address (street, city, state and zip code). Drafter initially proposed registered_office.address_city_state_zip — corrected to the address_line2 convention.
Date the dissolution is signed by the incorporators (top-left of page 1).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (incorporator) / (type or print name and capacity) — slot 1
rationale: First incorporator's printed name and capacity (top-right block of page 1, y≈695). Per-officer signer pattern (2026-04-30-per-officer-signer-pattern.md). Note: existing MNPCA-6 / MBCA-6 use only `incorporator_N.printed_name` — this form's widget caption is '(type or print name and capacity)' rather than the simpler '(printed name)' caption used on MNPCA-6, so the combined `printed_name_and_capacity` shape is required to match the widget.

label_verbatim: *By ____ (incorporator) / (type or print name and capacity) — slot 2
rationale: Second incorporator's printed name and capacity (y≈630).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (incorporator) / (type or print name and capacity) — slot 3
rationale: Third incorporator's printed name and capacity (y≈559).
